summary: Beautiful audience recording captures a superb second set – fiery Fire, soaring Scarlet Begonias and flawless Comes A Time shine.
review: The audience‑sourced tape is crystal clear with just the right amount of crowd ambience, making you feel present at the show.  The performance is highlighted by an inspired second set that includes a superb Let It Grow closer, scorching Fire, devastating He's Gone and a flawless Comes A Time, all played with confidence and passion.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave five stars and praised both the musical performance (especially the second set) and the high‑quality audience recording, indicating an exceptional show with excellent sound.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Beautiful‑sounding AUD tape; clear instrument separation, just enough crowd noise for atmosphere, no reported dropouts or muffiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set solid but unremarkable; second set delivered with confidence, seamless transitions and heightened energy that kept the audience engaged from start to finish.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s vocals and guitar work are described as nailing every lyric and sounding flawless, especially on Comes A Time.
band_member_comments.Drums: The drums (and subsequent Space) are praised as engaging and perfectly timed.
